prompt: A hyper-realistic, highly detailed, uncanny architectural photograph. A massive, imposing stone staircase plunges deeply downwards into a dark, foggy abyss. The overall rigid structure and trajectory of the massive staircase undeniably and drastically points straight down. However, in a bizarre, unsettling contradiction, every single individual stone step on the staircase is physically slanted steeply upwards. The viewer realizes with a sense of unease that to walk 'up' the individual slanted steps would paradoxically force them to descend deeper down the abyss. Cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic textures, standalone surreal visual paradox. Absolutely no text, no numbers, no diagrams, no characters anywhere.
visual_logic: A massive staircase undeniably plunges straight downwards into an abyss, yet every single individual step slants steeply upwards, visually capturing the uncanny, reversed local-global trend of Simpson's Paradox.
